title: Rawson, Chubut — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Rawson is a city in Chubut with a population of 40,000. Chubut’s capital on the Atlantic coast, with a Welsh heritage and nearby Punta Tombo penguin reserve.
